name: Agent Safety Controls
description: Human-in-the-loop safety toolkit for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore — centralized dashboard with cost, evaluation, and observability signals, plus a kill switch (IAM deny policy) and per-session intervention controls. Auto-provisions budgets, evaluation configs, and anomaly alarms per agent.

frameworks.name: Strands Agents SDK
frameworks.description: Strands framework with safety signal reporter

deployment_patterns.name: Bash orchestration
deployment_patterns.description: Modular deploy-all.sh across dashboard, cost/eval/obs controls, kill switch, and sample agent

parameters.name: admin_email
parameters.description: Admin email for the Agent Safety dashboard Cognito user

example_use_cases: Unified safety dashboard for AgentCore agents
Kill switch for revoking Bedrock access instantly
author: AVA Team
